Performance

Use this page to browse the subset of JRP scores with complete text underlay.

The ensemble Cut Circle performs exclusively from Josquin Research Project editions. Indeed the JRP is not only a tool for search and analysis, but also a vehicle for performance.

JRP tools useful to performers:

  • Browse range information on any work page (example).
  • Play a computer-generated mp3 of any work in the database.
  • Load JRP scores with or without editorial accidentals. (Versions with accidentals are signaled by a ♭ sign. See for example the reddish icons near the top right of every work page.)
  • Download JRP files from the bottom of any work page. Formats include:
    • MusicXML, which can be imported into Finale, Sibelius, MuseScore or similar.
    • MIDI, which can be used to extract individual voices for practice with the help of a MIDI editor.
